pi_items.source: Explicitly defined in the task description and setup_task.sh deletion script.

Task description requests 'Agent Performance Detail' and 'Real-Time Main Report'. Cross-referencing the Vicidial codebase (admin.php) verifies these UI report names map directly to AST_agent_performance_detail.php and AST_timeonVDADall.php.
Task description explicitly requires blocking all 'Export' reports.
Task description explicitly states 'Force Change Password: Y'.

privileged_info_summary: The task requires creating a synthetic Vicidial User Group with ID 'SUP_SECURE' and setting 'Force Change Password' to 'Y'. The allowed reports must be strictly limited to 'Agent Performance Detail' and 'Real-Time Main Report', which were verified through Vicidial source code analysis to map to the underlying PHP scripts 'AST_agent_performance_detail.php' and 'AST_timeonVDADall.php'. All reports containing the keyword 'export' must be blocked.
